caption: A man wearing a white dress shirt, a red bow tie, and tan suspenders speaks into a professional microphone. He wears glasses, over-ear headphones, and a tall, stylized grey wig that mimics a vertical hairstyle. He is seated in a room with walls covered in numerous framed photographs and posters, including a yellow sign that says "LEE". A logo featuring a microphone icon and the text "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" appears on the screen. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, speaking and slightly shifting his head and facial expressions as he talks. The background remains static, and the camera angle stays fixed on the man from the chest up, capturing his continuous delivery during the podcast recording.
